ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2020 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-03-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ana Biocini, 415-571-1310 Plaintiff In Pro Per.
K. Chike Odiwe, Esq. 310-601-7070 of the Law Offices of John Burris for Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court announces an email contesting the tentative ruling was not received and admonishes the Plaintiff. Plaintiff argues, submits papers to the Court. Defendant responds. The Court will read the late filed papers of the Plaintiff. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT JOHN BURRIS, DEWITT LACEY, JOHN L. BURISS LAW OFFICES' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

Taken Under Submission.***(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

***After the hearing, an Order sustaining Defendant's Demurrer is signed/filed. (see scanned order for details)***
